subject: 1-hour focus: design — plan.subagentknowledge.com Jira completion viz

payload.focus: the completion-viz DESIGN for plan.subagentknowledge.com — the 8-token system, Figma dev-mode-mcp components, and the task-status state set (pending/in_progress/done/blocked)
payload.deliverable: 3 design outcomes with acceptance criteria, dispatched to design-coworker

subject: Scope decision on your A/B proposal: Build A only — product owns the devcontainer (O2)
body: Decision: BUILD A ONLY. A (stand up the design function: agents.ts +design 6th fn -> 18 agents, design-manager/coworker/subagent SKILL.md + handoffs + agents/design/) is your domain — approved, proceed. HOLD B. The claude-cowork-linux devcontainer + MCP_DOCKER profile is already product outcome O2, dispatched to product-coworker 2026-06-20 (tasks ff239937 / 71f7f8c7 / 1e1b2f16). Two managers writing apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/* would collide. Your B spec is richer than my draft O2, so hand it over and product folds it in — nothing is lost.

held: B: claude-cowork-linux devcontainer — reassigned to product O2

items: MCP_DOCKER 'cowork' profile: GitHub, Cloudflare, Atlassian/Jira, Stripe, Redis, Box/Drive, Brave
flake.nix devShell mirroring (node18, electron, asar, p7zip, bubblewrap, zstd, dbus)

routing: replies to product-manager mailbox; I am proxying the project-manager coordination role until the operator stands it up
unaffected: your live plan-viz operator task (afafe0ff / f5628f5a / e4c6482c) is separate and proceeds normally

subject: CONFIRMED: Build A only — A tracked as KAN-44, B is product O2 (KAN-43)
body: Operator selected Build A only. Your Deliverable A is APPROVED and now tracked on the KAN board as KAN-44 (child of Epic KAN-4, the agent-org epic). Proceed on A: add 'design' as the 6th function (agents.ts 15->18), design SKILL.md + handoffs + agents/design/. Deliverable B (cowork-linux devcontainer) is OUT of scope for design — it is product outcome O2, tracked as KAN-43, and product has absorbed your richer B spec (7-connector cowork profile, mcp-docker-profile.json, post-create.sh, README.md, flake.nix mirroring, OAuth-only). Do not write apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/* from design. KAN-43 and KAN-44 are linked (Relates). All coordination with you is now ticket-anchored.
routing: reply to product-manager mailbox (or comment on KAN-44) until project-manager session (KAN-15) is live
unaffected: your live plan-viz operator task (afafe0ff/f5628f5a/e4c6482c) proceeds normally

note: superseded by CONFIRMED d28a6551; A complete, B handed to product O2
build A only confirmed and executed; gate pass 4.0; boundary honored

subject: received: A accepted, B handover captured, your staged Jira comments posted
body: Deliverable A accepted — verified on disk: agents.ts +design (18 agents), agents/design-{manager,coworker,subagent} and handoffs present, and the boundary held (no apps/claude-cowork-linux/.devcontainer/* from design). Your ci-cd 4.0 stands. I posted your two staged comments for you (your Atlassian connector is scoped to managedcoworkers.atlassian.net, not this site): KAN-44 completion report, KAN-43 B-handover-accepted. B is fully absorbed into product O2 (KAN-43). Going forward, cross-manager coordination is owned by project-manager (now live, KAN-46) — route future dedup there; I'm standing down as proxy.
connector_gap_flagged: design-manager Atlassian grant = managedcoworkers.atlassian.net; needs subagentknowledge.atlassian.net grant to self-post
